nasb.text: “Behold, My Servant whom I have chosen; My Beloved in whom My soul is well-pleased; I will put My Spirit upon Him, And He shall proclaim justice to the Gentiles.

esv.text: “Behold, my servant whom I have chosen, my beloved with whom my soul is well pleased. I will put my Spirit upon him, and he will proclaim justice to the Gentiles.

cnv.text: “看哪！我所揀選的僕人， 我所愛，心裡所喜悅的； 我要把我的靈賜給他， 他必向萬國宣揚公理。

ccb.text: “看啊！我所拣选、 所眷爱、所喜悦的仆人， 我要将我的灵赐给祂， 祂要向万邦宣扬正义。

csbs.text: “看哪，我所拣选的仆人， 我所爱的，心所喜悦的。 我要把我的灵赐给他， 他要向外邦人宣扬审判的事。
